findings.message: GoReleaser runs go generate and frontend package(s) exist, but release workflow does not set up pnpm
findings.hint: Add pnpm/action-setup before GoReleaser or remove frontend generation from release hooks.

findings.message: Frontend package may need dependencies before go generate: web
findings.hint: Install dependencies with `pnpm --dir web install --frozen-lockfile` before GoReleaser.
